title: household_observation/v1 payload
description: Ship-1 deployer shape. A CHV records a household visit. village_ref ties the record to a geographic scope for scope-containment checks; household_name is the Ship-1 key for identity_conflict detection (two captures with the same name in the same village = suspected duplicate).

village_ref.description: UUID of the village this household is in. Must match an assignment scope.geographic for the capturing actor, else scope_violation is flagged.
